title: core: SecretUri pub fields will fossilize before 0.1.0 ships
description: SecretUri::backend, path, and params are pub mutable fields. Doc says 'treat as read-only' but the type system does not enforce it. params is HashMap<String,String> — changing to IndexMap or multi-value later is a breaking change. Every backend crate that accesses u.params directly (vs u.param()) becomes load-bearing against the representation. Fix before 0.1.0: make fields pub(crate), add read accessors backend()/path()/params_iter(). This cannot be undone after first publish.
